intro: The Mirax and NGate threat actors were active in the Android ecosystem during this period, with CVE-2023-4863 among the key vulnerabilities exploited. Their campaigns primarily targeted the cryptocurrency and financial services sectors, along with individuals, technology, and telecommunications. The attacks showed a significant geographic focus on Europe, Brazil, Latin America, and Spain, with some incidents having a global reach. The severity of the reported incidents was notable, with a majority classified as high or critical among the eleven articles in this archive.
